name: network.clockchain/clockchain
description: Hosted MCP server for Clockchain — consensus time, notarization, agent-attested receipts, audit trails, and agent identity. 31 tools, no install: connect any MCP client to the hosted HTTP endpoint.

headers.name: x-api-key
headers.description: Clockchain API key (per user). Free testnet token, no signup: curl -X POST https://mcp.clockchain.network/token
